docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT MARKEL, MEGAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARKLE, MEGAN (SUED AS MEGAN MARKEL) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT MARKLE, MEGAN (SUED AS MEGAN MARKEL) HEARING SET FOR OCT-25-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-25-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MEGAN MARKLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR # 8620 (301/PJB)
